description: VERIFIED LIVE: 新浪新闻 (Sina News) via its public roll-feed JSON API (no login, no key) — structured + paginated, preferred over DOM. feed.mix.sina.com.cn/api/roll/get returns result.data[] with title, url, ctime. Tested live by Claude Code: 20 articles, clean JSON.

tools.name: sina_news_roll
tools.description: 新浪 rolling news feed. Returns result.data[] (each: title, url, ctime, intime). Page with the page param. VERIFIED (20 articles). Common lid: 2509 (全部/要闻), 2510 (国内), 2511 (国际), 2669 (社会).

params.name: lid
params.description: Channel id; 2509=全部, 2510=国内, 2511=国际, 2669=社会.
